creator: datahead4@gmail.com
text:
The release version of Kipi-plugins 0.2.0 is now available ( http://www.digikam.org/drupal/node/433 ). The attached patch will update the graphics/kipi-plugins-kde4 port to version 0.2.0.

Please note, the proposed patch changes "DISTVERSION" to "PORTVERSION" in the port Makefile and I am not sure if there are any negative ramifications to doing this (e.g. port upgrade tools not picking up the upgrade; package building issues). Please let me know if this is not a good thing to do.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
